docket_entries.description: MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON SEP-19-2012 IN 206, APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. APPLICANT'S REQUEST FOR CONTINUANCE OF HEARING IS DENIED. OBJECTION IS NOTED. REHEARING ON P.W. FU'S APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS IS HELD. THE RULING ON THE APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS REMAINS AS IS. NO FUTURE REQUESTS FOR FEE WAIVER SHALL BE GRANTED AT THE FILING COUNTER. ORDER SENT BY THE COURT. JUDGE: KATHERINE FEINSTEIN; CLERK: J.I. ROQUE/D. LOK; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)

LAW AND MOTION 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. RULING: THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT JUDGE RICHARD B. ULMER, JR.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO OCTOBER 16, 2012. JUDGE KAHN HAS RECUSED HIMSELF FROM HEARING ANY MATTERS IN THIS CASE. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, NOT REPORTED.

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT JUDGE RICHARD B. ULMER, JR.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO NOVEMBER 13, 2012 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 302. JUDGE KAHN HAS RECUSED HIMSELF FROM THIS CASE. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, NOT REPORTED.

TRIAL MOTION CALENDAR ON SEP-19-2012 IN 206, THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO DECLARE PLAINTIFF P.W. FU A VEXATIOUS LITIGANT WAS HEARD. APPEARANCE BY SELF-REPRESENTED PLAINTIFF AND ATTORNEY KEVIN MACLAUGHLIN FOR DEFENDANT(S) IN VARIOUS CASES WHERE MS. FU IS THE PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR CONTINUANCE OF HEARING WAS DENIED. OBJECTION WAS NOTED. MOTION WAS ARGUED AND THE COURT ORDERED MS. FU DECLARED A VEXATIOUS LITIGANT PURSUANT TO CCP 391(B)(3). ANY NEW CLAIM FILED BY MS. FU IN THE FUTURE SHALL REQUIRE A PRE-FILING ORDER FROM THE PRESIDING JUDGE'S DEPARTMENT. PLAINTIFF STATED SEVERAL VARIATIONS OF HER NAME AS FOLLOWS: P.W. FU, PO WAN FU, BO WAN FU. THE COURT INSTRUCTED PLAINTIFF TO UPDATE THE COURT'S RECORD WITH HER MOST RECENT ADDRESS. THE COURT WILL PREPARE AND SERVE THE ORDER. JUDGE: KATHERINE FEINSTEIN; CLERK: J.I. ROQUE/D. LOK; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR DEFENDANT JUDGE RICHARD B. ULMER, JR.'S DEMURRER HEARING SET FOR NOV-13-2012 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 624
